Home Four Wine Coop Arena Toon Tanks Capstone

Coop Arena

Coop Arena is the current project I am working on. I’m building it inside of a UE5 source build (yeah I know, “still in development, don’t use it.” Got it to play with then ended up just rolling with it.) It is a small 3rd person multiplayer game, designed with a maximum of 4 players, where you fight against waves of enemies. I am using GAS for this project. There are both weapons and spellbooks, which each grant abilities of their own type (attacks for weapons, spells for spellbooks). I’m planning on having weapons and spellbooks to be loot drops. In between each wave will be a vendor that allows you to upgrade your stats and gear (weapons and spellbooks).

Currently have basic AI behavior (just chases you spamming its attack), basic combat system (movement, weapons, spellbooks), and wave functionality.
